title: LOWLINESS OF MIND VISION OF A HIND

paragraphs.text: LOWLINESS OF MIND VISION OF A HIND
JESUS: Would you like to share with SHEKINAIH the vision I gave you regarding the hind that visited me?

DAVID: In my early years seeking THE YAHWEH, persecutions and debasement is a daily training for me to be lowly. Every night I would mourn, sing and meditate on the Book of Psalms and crying out to be comforted. One day, a seer friend of mine while praying for me, saw a vision of me superimposed on a hind walking toward a tent during a still night. As the female deer reach the opening of the tent, JESUS immediately open the curtain of the tent's entrance and look into her eyes with loving tenderness. At that moment, the hind stood motionless being completely intoxicated by the divine love and compassion that flows from JESUS's eyes.
JESUS: Do you know the interpretation of this vision?

DAVID: Lord, I am not very sure, but I was comforted because of that vision because I felt loved by you. Would you further enlighten us the meaning? JESUS: My beloved must abide in Me, and We in them, that We may be completely one. As I am in THE FATHER, and you in Me, thereby, shall be one
with Us, and thereby are united with Us as one. Therefore, are greatly loved by Us.

Pro 5:18 Let thy fountain be blessed: and rejoice with the wife of thy youth. Pro 5:19 Let her be as the loving hind (H365 "ayeleth") and pleasant roe; let her breasts (H1717 "dad" as the seat of love, same as H1730 dod" to boil with love) satisfy (H7301 "ravah" saturated, intoxicated) thee at all times; and be thou ravished always with her love.
Now let Me decode in details the Revelation of Psalms 22 to you.

Psalms 22 is written to you my last days' David, the chief singer, concerning My Brides symbolized by the hind, Aijeleth and I am the Shahar, the daystar, their husband. You are the overseer and leader of all the other hind that will follow My footsteps in My suffering. They are likened to the scarletworm Cermes vermilio, a scaled insect that feeds upon the oak and is used for producing red dye. The males, which are smaller than the females, pass through a complete metamorphosis and develop wings. Like Me, they will suffer reproach from men and will be despised and killed but resurrected and become fiery red phoenixes. I was the first begotten of the dead to be resurrected and they, like me, were from the womb of THE HOLY SPIRIT. In the last days, they will suffer persecutions from the sons of the Nephilim, the rulers of this age. They are called "Yachiyd", those who are joined with Me in spirit. They are the children whom THE FATHER has given you, our last days' David to be perfected. They are My brethren. They shall be depressed in mind to be lowly in order to ascend further to the Holy Mountain to be among the great congregation in Mount Zion. These are the last days' generation who will rule with Me over the nations in the coming age because as they have suffered with Me, they will also reign with Me; as they have died with Me, they will also resurrect with Me.

Psa 22:1 To the chief Musician (H5329 "natsach" overseer as denominative of H5331 "netsach" victory) concerning (H5921 "al") Aijeleth (H365 "ayeleth" hind) Shahar, (H7837 "shachar" dawn, dayspring) A Psalm of David. My EL, My EL, why hast thou forsaken me? why art thou so far from helping me, and from the words of my roaring? Psa 22:2 O my ELOHIM, I cry in the daytime, but thou hearest not; and in the night season, and am not silent. Psa 22:3 But thou art holy, O thou that inhabitest the praises of Israel. Psa 22:4 Our fathers trusted in thee: they trusted, and thou didst deliver them. Psa 22:5 They cried unto thee, and were delivered: they trusted in thee, and were not confounded. Psa 22:6 But I am a worm (H8438 "tola" crimson grub), and no man; a reproach of men, and despised of the people. Psa 22:7 All they that see me laugh me to scorn: they shoot out the lip, they shake the head, saying, Psa 22:8 He trusted on THE YAHWEH that he would deliver him: let him deliver him, seeing he delighted in him. Psa 22:9 But thou art he that took me out of the womb: thou didst make me hope when I was upon my mother's breasts. Psa 22:10 I was cast upon thee from the womb: thou art my EL from my mother's belly. Psa 22:11 Be not far from me; for trouble is near; for there is none to help. Psa 22:12 Many bulls have compassed me: strong bulls of Bashan have beset me round. Psa 22:13 They gaped upon me with their mouths, as a ravening and a roaring lion. Psa 22:14 I am poured out like water, and all my bones are out of joint: my heart is like wax; it is melted in the midst of my bowels. Psa 22:15 My strength is dried up like a potsherd; and my tongue cleaveth to my jaws; and thou hast brought me into the dust of death. Psa 22:16 For dogs have compassed me: the assembly of the wicked have inclosed me: they pierced my hands and my feet. Psa 22:17 I may tell all my bones: they look and stare upon me. Psa 22:18 They part my garments among them, and cast lots upon my vesture. Psa 22:19 But be not thou far from me, O THE YAHWEH: O my strength, haste thee to help me. Psa 22:20 Deliver my soul from the sword; my united (H3173 "yachiyd" united) from the power of the dog. Psa 22:21 Save me from the lion's mouth: for thou hast heard me from the horns of the unicorns. Psa 22:22 I will declare thy name unto my brethren: in the midst of the congregation will I praise thee. Psa 22:23 Ye that fear THE YAHWEH, praise him; all ye the seed of Jacob, glorify him; and fear him, all ye the seed of

Israel. Psa 22:24 For he hath not despised nor abhorred the oppression (H6039 "enuth") of the lowly (H6041 "aniy" depress in mind); neither hath he hid his face from him; but when he cried unto him, he heard. Psa 22:25 My praise shall be of thee in the great congregation: I will pay my vows before them that fear him. Psa 22:26 The lowly (H6035 "anav") shall eat and be satisfied: they shall praise THE YAHWEH that seek him: your heart shall live forever. Psa 22:27 All the ends of the earth (H776 "erets") shall remember and turn unto THE YAHWEH: and all the kindreds of the nations shall worship before thee. Psa 22:28 For the kingdom is THE YAHWEH'S: and he is the governor among the nations. Psa 22:29 All they that be fat upon earth shall eat and worship: all they that go down to the dust shall bow before him: and none can keep alive his own soul. Psa 22:30 A seed shall serve him; it shall be accounted to THE YAHWEH for a generation. Psa 22:31 They shall come, and shall declare his righteousness unto a people that shall be born, that he hath done this.
These will be accepted by Us to be the heavenly Mount Zion, Our rest because they are lowly in mind, contrite in spirit and show reverence when We speak.

Isa 66:1 Thus saith THE YAHWEH, The heaven is my throne, and the earth is my footstool: where is the house that ye build unto me? and where is the place of my rest? Isa 66:2 For all those things hath mine hand made, and all those things have been, saith THE YAHWEH: but to this man will I look, even to him that is lowly in mind (H6041 "aniy") and of a contrite spirit, and trembleth at my word.

They have followed my example by emptying themselves, deny their right and forsake everything and have obeyed THE FATHER in lowliness of mind even unto the death of the cross. Therefore shall also be exalted like Me as blameless and harmless; son of THE ELOHIM, without rebuke in the midst of a crooked and perverse nation.

Php 2:3 Let nothing be done through strife or vainglory; but in lowliness of mind let each esteem other better than themselves. Php 2:4 Look not every man on his own things, but every man also on the things of others. Php 2:5 Let this mind be in you, which was also in Christ JESUS: Php 2:6 Who, being in the form of THE ELOHIM, thought it not robbery to be equal with THE ELOHIM: Php 2:7 But emptied himself, and took upon him the form of a servant, and was made in the likeness of men: Php 2:8 And being found in fashion as a man, he humbled himself, and became obedient unto death, even the death of the cross. Php 2:9 Wherefore THE ELOHIM also hath highly exalted him, and given him a name which is above every name: Php 2:10 That at the name of JESUS every knee should bow, of things in heaven, and things in earth, and things under the earth; Php 2:11 And that every tongue should confess that JESUS Christ is THE YAHWEH, to the glory of THE ELOHIM THE FATHER. Php 2:12 Wherefore, my beloved, as ye have always obeyed, not as in my presence only, but now much more in my absence, work out your own salvation with fear and trembling.

Through their lowliness of mind, they have received much grace from Us to be able to go through the shames and reproaches with a right attitude and are completely and thoroughly established, strengthened and consolidated in holiness and accounted righteous to be a part of the Holy Jerusalem.

1Pe 5:5 Likewise, ye younger, submit yourselves unto the elder. Yea, all of you be subject one to another, and be clothed with lowliness of mind: for THE ELOHIM resisted the proud, and gives grace to the lowly. 1Pe 5:6 Abase yourselves therefore under the mighty hand of THE ELOHIM, that he may exalt you in due time: 1Pe 5:7 Casting all your distraction (G3308 "merman") upon him; for he careth for you. 1Pe 5:8 Be sober, be vigilant; because your adversary the devil, as a roaring lion, walketh about, seeking whom he may devour: 1Pe 5:9 Whom resist stedfast in the faith, knowing that the same undergoings are to be fulfilled further(G2005 "epiteleo) in your brethren that are in the Cosmos. 1Pe 5:10 But of all grace, who hath called us unto
his eternal glory by Christ JESUS, after that ye have suffered a while, complete thoroughly (G2675 "katartizo"), stablish, strengthen, consolidate you.
